violations.text: Several Food Items was observed held at 55-58 degrees Fahrenheit in the Single Door Cooler #2. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

Reduced Oxygen Packaged (ROP) Lobster was observed thawed in its intact packaging in the Single Door Cooler #2. PIC informed that all ROP Seafood items labeled keep frozen are to be removed from package immediately upon thawing. ROP Lobster was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged lobster was observed thawing in a refrigeration unit without breaking the seal or otherwise introducing adequate oxygen to product. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Several food items in the grill prep unit were observed held at 43 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. A the time of inspection, the unit was observed to be opened often. Foods were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023

The Prep Unit at the Grill Line was observed to be maintaining food temps at @ 43 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit with an ambient temperature of 42 degrees at the time of inspection. Unit is to be checked for colder cold holding setting to help maintain proper cold holding food temperatures during times of business. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
